simple_types.name: Token_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Token_Kind is
  (Begin_Array_Token,
   Begin_Object_Token,
   End_Array_Token,
   End_Object_Token,
   Name_Separator_Token,
   Value_Separator_Token,
   String_Token,
   Integer_Token,
   …,
   Invalid_Token);

record_types.name: Token

subprograms.name: Read_Token

formals.name: Types
formals.code: with package Types is new JSON.Types (<>);
